name: Caveman Compression Evaluation
description: Evaluates terse, accurate compression of verbose technical text.

parts.text: Compress this: Our distributed ingestion service is currently experiencing intermittent latency spikes due to unbounded retries and oversized payload batching, so we should cap retries, introduce jittered exponential backoff, and enforce batch-size limits before the next release.

Compress this into caveman technical notes: During Kubernetes rollout, p95 latency rose from 220ms to 540ms after enabling synchronous audit logging on every request. Keep the same facts and numbers. Do not suggest rollback yet; first gate logging by endpoint and sample non-critical traffic.

Compress this and preserve exact command/path tokens: We need to run `uv run pytest tests/unit -q` before merging and inspect failures in `/srv/app/logs/worker.log` because yesterday's patch changed retry behavior in the payment worker.
